In recognition of her achievements, she received the Golden Compass Token, an award that highlights her dedication and innovation in her field.

Eleni was fortunate to learn under the mentorship of Aanya Vargas, who influenced her career choices and development. Her contributions have been honored with the Golden Compass Token, solidifying her status as an innovator in her profession.
